text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the final stages of<n>preparations. As we
all attend to our<n>duties, the topic of what songs to
sing<n>comes up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello asks me to be involved in<n>writing lyrics
for a certain song she's<n>prepared specially for the
concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students and I set our minds to<n>the task. What
lyrics would express<n>what they, as runners, feel
for their<n>fans?
